what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-1d03e344.
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone.
standouts: target is a board:// URI for a board item.
It is a timestamped, typed cross-reference record.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a stable att-* identifier.
Uses ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone.
Uses a board:// URI scheme to identify the target object.
concerns: No explanatory body or context beyond the frontmatter.
The meaning and lifecycle of the attachment are not defined in the file.
The referenced board item cannot be verified from this file alone.
notes: A bare, timestamped attachment metadata stub that points a dragnet-development channel attachment at a specific board item.
questions: What content or message does this attachment represent?
What is the semantic relationship between the attachment and the board item?
Who created the attachment and why?
Is the referenced board item still current or valid?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated, but the fields match a channel-attachment record that links to a board item.
intention_signals: To create a durable, dated pointer from a channel attachment to a specific board item so the two can be associated later.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI as the target in an otherwise generic attachment metadata record.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link between a channel memory attachment and a board item, enabling lookup between channel memory and board records.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record in dragnet-development with type board_items targeting board://item-1d03e344 and an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To associate a channel memory attachment with a specific board item for later retrieval and cross-referencing.
